features: A Mouthwash for maintaining proper oral Hygiene
Clean and prevent tartar and cavities
Provides a refreshing and well-being sensation
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Active oral care anti-cavity Mouthwash with fluoride provides a refreshing and well-being sensation, thanks to its clean cool mint flavour. It is very effective in fighting the causes of bad breath, protects and strengthens your teeth against cavities, leaving you with a fresh breath. Directions Use a certain amount (not specified), swish around in the mouth for a specific duration (not specified), do not swallow. For daily use. Safety Warning Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. See more
